payload.label: cabinet
payload.short_description: dark recessed wooden cabinet door edge-cropped
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and a narrow top drawer fascia; matte finish, minor edge wear/scuffing visible, no hardware shown, and the crop is vertically edge-trimmed — photographed at approximately 0.6 meters from the camera.
